questionHtml:
Which statements are correct about the action of a catalyst in a chemical reaction?

I.   It increases the energy of each collision.
II.  It alters the mechanism of the reaction.
III. It remains unchanged at the end of the reaction.

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which statements are correct about the action of a catalyst in a chemical reaction? I. It increases the energy of each collision.II. It alters the mechanism of the reaction.III. It
